title: Story Mod
description: Adding mobs and lore from Minecraft: Story Mode
body:
![mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WARwMXAZ/images/3ad1bbe4d003056c906492db9e8912a698478d93.png)

Story Mod lets the players experience a remade version of Minecraft Story Mode in Minecraft


Currently in early beta



Join the discord for any questions:
[https://discord.gg/cav7Hj3Fqv](https://discord.gg/cav7Hj3Fqv)
 



Additional Credits:

>Logo made using Ewan Howell's blockbench plugin

>Music and sounds come from the original Minecraft: Story Mode game, I'm no legal expert, so if something is of concern please contact us through our discord or direct messaging on curseforge
